114354.title: Taste of Magic: Archmage's Shadow [Slice-of-Life LitRPG]
114354.description:
What if the world's strongest mage traded her legendary power for a rolling pin?

[Archmage] Melina rewound time to save Alemahria, sacrificed her magic, leaving the Church and nobles behind.

Instead of fighting monster hordes, she will knead, bake and for the first time ever taste a slice of happiness.

But peace is elusive when old enemies lurk in the shadows, the Church still haunts her, and her best customer is a tart-obsessed wyrm.

What to expect:

-LitRPG with classes, stats, and baking skills 

-Regressor MC with a dark past

-Slow Burn slice-of-life (with occasional monster attacks)

-Monster familiar

New chapter every Tuesday, Thursday, Friday and Sunday.

Join my Discord for newest updates and announcements.

Join my Patreon for 20+ advanced chapters.

112647.title: The Legacy of the Moon and the Sun: Feelings That Change Even History
112647.description:
A fantasy story about love, friendship, family, and many other things that are completely "insignificant" when not only the future of humanity, but the entire history of Earth is at stake.

But not every fantasy begins with swords and spells. Some begin with awkward conversations, cringeworthy jokes, and protagonists who are just trying to survive society, school, and their own emotions.

This is a slow-burn story that starts as a drama-comedy, where the fantastic seeps in gradually. If you’re looking for immediate action, you’ll likely be disappointed. But if you're patient, and like characters who evolve with the story, then this one's for you.

New chapter at least every two weeks.

97880.title: Goblin Hunter
97880.description:
In the tourist town of Ferndale, CA, Kimmie Blanco is accosted by a goblin hiding in the forest behind her rustic bed-and-breakfast. She’s horrified at first, but her inquisitive and determined nature pushes her to learn everything she can about this strange new supernatural creature, and its possible connection to the brutal deaths of her aunt and uncle. Realizing she can’t do it all by herself, she reaches out to the best goblin hunter in the world, Jed Hauk… only to get his brooding son, Ollie, and his snarky pygmy goblin sidekick, Grika, instead.

Ollie reluctantly helps Kimmie in her hunt, despite suffering his own crisis of faith in the ‘family business.’ The life of a hunter is lonely, unappreciated, and littered with personal losses, and his enthusiasm is further diminished when what should be a simple hunt turns into a fiasco. When more dead bodies start showing up in the forest, Kimmie and Ollie are forced to confront the mystery this strange little goblin presents. Is he acting alone, or is he simply the harbinger for more trouble to come?

113171.title: A vigil for humanity
113171.description:
A long and brutal civil war comes to an end. A dictator is overthrown. The people step out, blinking into the light of an unfamiliar freedom.

Few know how hard the road ahead is. How many old wounds must be re-opened for them to heal properly. Fewer even, know how to guide a country through this painful transition.

And then there's the thing that nobody knows. The reality of their world that was hidden from them by the old regime.

---

Updates every Friday.

119384.title: A Crown of Ash and Gold [Dark Fantasy]
119384.description:
A more tightly-woven Game of Thrones, reborn in a Nordic land.

A dirge for one age, the twilight of an empire. The ancient throne teeters, while a long-slumbering rebellion gathers on the eastern winds. As all eyes fix upon the contested crown, a name forgotten for a thousand years is whispered: Dragon.

In this volatile landscape, to secure a crown—or to ignite a war—an unprecedented auction is held in the capital city. Eight treasures of power and betrayal have become the stakes in a great game. But the ninth treasure should not exist: a necklace engraved with a devastating lie. It's a dagger aimed at the Empire's heart.

This storm was orchestrated by shrewd players:

🎭 Ysolda: An astute agent. Armed with only her wits, she has to choose between loyalty and survival. Tasked with uncovering a conspiracy, she finds herself drawn into the very eye of the storm. Can she grab a lifeline in the intense conflicts?

🐺 Grey Wolf: A fallen prince driven by vengeance. The grand auction is meant to be his masterpiece, but he finds himself caught in a deadly trap. When his mask is cracked and his soul is put on trial, which side will he choose in the end?

⚔️ The Kings & Killers: While the king and the rebel leader forge a pact that could save many lives, in the shadows of a tavern, a spymaster and a legendary swordsman play their deadly game. When conspiracies and lies are forged into an invisible blade, what fate awaits the kingdom?

Every player believes they control the game. But when ancient dragons return to incinerate their chessboard, all golden rules are burned away with it.

And amidst the burning ashes, the true story begins—aboard a prisoner's cart, where a youth of unknown identity opens his eyes.

What to Expect in This Book

👑 An Intricately Woven Narrative with Multiple POVs.

👑 Exceptional Character Development.

👑 Slow-Burn Story with Shocking Twists.

👑 Masterful Political Intrigue, Deception, and Strategy. 

👑 Indomitable Spirits in a Brutal World.

This is a new story, but set in the familiar world of The Elder Scrolls. It builds extensively on the Civil War narrative, introducing a more thrilling and intense conflict while preserving the essence of the original.

Think of this as an epic that stands alone and requires no pre-existing knowledge.

New chapters every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday.

108745.title: Moonfire & Midnight
108745.description:
An exiled princess, a poisoned husband, and a battle for power—Eirian Soliel refuses to be forgotten, but can she turn a cold marriage into a fiery alliance before it’s too late?

First cousin to the King and the darling of the Court of Sorrow, Eirian has spent most of her life indulging all her whims and fantasies under the protection of her royal blood, but when her father’s sudden re-marriage results in a son, she finds herself suddenly shuffled aside.

On top of that, her longtime on-and-off romantic partner suddenly betrays her. Instead of proposing to her, he shows up to her birthday ball, married to a low-ranked Lady without a word of warning.

Eirian’s life is upended, and her stepmother succeeds in exiling her into an arranged marriage with a general who never leaves the distant borderland. Regimented, completely disinterested in the capitol and the Court, and dying from a poison no one can identify, her new husband would rather continue his simple life with his mistress than welcome his new wife, but Eirian refuses to go down without fight.

Determined to make a place for herself if she cannot find one, Eirian finds herself facing an enemy she never expected, and she underestimates her shy, gentle husband.

Will the General fall for his vivacious Princess, or will Eirian be set aside again?

121068.title: Construction Mage
121068.description:
Paying rent sucks. Properties are overpriced. But could you fix that with magic?

Become the strongest, defeat powerful enemies, save the world—those are the typical things people who get summoned to another world do. Clayton Stratton won’t have any of that, though. He’d rather stay in the comforts of his home and enjoy a cup of tea over a book. However, that doesn’t mean he’ll ignore the world’s problems. He’ll just leave it to others instead. 

Unfortunately for Clay, he came into an unfriendly world, broke. With monsters overflowing from dungeons limiting humanity’s living space to the few walled cities they have, a regular job won’t be enough to pay the bills. From what he has read about dungeons, the living conditions will only get worse the more time passes. In order to build himself a cozy home and guide others with his knowledge of the dungeons, he’ll have to utilize the miraculous power of magic to tackle both goals. 

Construction work isn’t easy. Neither is getting others to listen to his word without coming off as a crazy doomer. Thankfully, his two goals may not be as different as he thinks.

What to expect?

- LitRPG with lots of leveling up

- An Earth Mage with an unorthodox build (Not just shooting big spells)

- Kingdom building? More like building buildings.

- Dungeon delving

- Recreating modern comforts with magic (Who wants to live somewhere without proper plumbing?)

- Probably a shovel

Release Schedule

On release, 5x a week for the first four weeks (Extra chapters for hitting milestones)

Then tentatively 4x a week (Mon-Thu)

95904.title: Spell Weaver [Book 2 Complete]
95904.description:
Alex was just trying to escape his dead-end job and overbearing family. Then the System arrived, bringing with it magic, Rifts, and the chance for ordinary people to become extraordinary. Unfortunately for Alex, his stats started out as unimpressive as his old life. But when he gains the unique trait {Primordial Will}, which only allows him to put his free points into one stat, everything changes—though not necessarily for the better.

This is a slow burn story with Alex learning a lot about magic, himself, and his friends. There are moments that just show normal life, and some that feel like there is no direction or plot at all. There are some very high-octane, adventure moments where the numbers go way up, and there are also some losses that aren't going to feel great. Losses happen and mistakes are made, but our MC will continue to grow stronger. 

This series follows Alex as he begins to master the art of Mana Threads and creates a revolutionary new magic system with Spell Circles. He starts to realize that magic isn’t just a tool—it’s a path to power that few can fully grasp. But with the world’s governments struggling to contain the rising number of superhuman threats, Alex will have to navigate more than just monsters and Rifts. In a world where “might makes right,” who really calls the shots?

What to expect:

- Slow story by RR standards
- The "stuck in a Rift arc" is about 20 chapters and has Xianxia elements
- A realistic take on how Earth adapts to System integration.
- Weak to Strong to Godlike MC
- A unique magic system creation, blending rituals and runes to create Spell Circles. (This happens gradually over the first two books. Then he uses it for the rest of the series.)
- After Book One, there are a lot of party dynamics, creating a large cast of characters.

Chapters are 3000 words on average, with three chapters released weekly.

Currently posting Monday / Wednesday / Friday at 10AM EST.

Read 30 chapters ahead on Patreon!
Join the Discord Community!

89699.title: Grimoire
89699.description:
Albion. A land of magic, mysteries, and cults. Amongst the many dangers are horrific beings from another world, existing and acting beyond human comprehension. They are called Eldritch. Merely looking at an Eldritch can drive an ordinary human insane; if they don’t die outright. When a human seals an Eldritch’s power within themselves, a grimoire is formed.

The most infamous grimoire in history is the Silver Grimoire. 

The Silver Grimoire, alongside its twin, the Golden Grimoire were the catalyst for all magic. Together they united humanity to defeat the Eldritch thousands of years ago. However, the Silver Grimoire launched a rebellion to seize control of the world, weaponizing the very Eldritch they once fought. Upon its defeat, the Silver Grimoire vowed to one day return and bring about destruction. Eventually the tale of the Gold and Silver Grimoires would fade into legend. 

After the Eldritch returned ten years ago, the nation of Easenna was left in ruins. Blamed for causing their return, the King of Easenna alongside his followers were overthrown by Albion through a long and violent war. As a result, Albion was left as the sole superpower on the continent.

Aria Corvo, an Easennian swordswoman-turned prisoner of war comes face-to-face with the Silver Grimoire. A man by the name of Espoir claiming to fight grimoires and Eldritch.

123819.title: Kill Me If You Can [Underpowered LitRPG, with a Slice of Sarcasm]
123819.description:
Charming. Witty. Unfiltered.
That’s me.
The AI voice in his head keeping him alive.
Why?
Good question. He spawned into this world with the worst race possible, limited access to spells, and no real skills to speak of.
He’s not exactly worth saving. Constantly diving into danger, ignoring my advice, and then acting surprised when it all goes sideways.
But sure, the story’s technically about him. Some guy with a sword, no skills, and a chronic habit of ignoring my perfectly reasonable advice.
If you like LitRPG fantasy with realistic progression, brutal fights, and one delightfully snarky, all-knowing AI, then congratulations. You’ve found your next read.
Go on. Click the first chapter. I dare you.

104561.title: For the Glory of Rome: Chronicles of an Isekai'd Legion
104561.description:
A wise man once said all roads lead to Rome. He didn’t know how right he was.

Ripped away from the battlefield, Tiberius and his six thousand Roman Legionnaires unexpectedly find themselves stranded in a foreign land of magic and witchcraft. With no way home, their path forward is obvious: conquer everything in sight.

Much to the chagrin of Marcus—the poor, unsuspecting bard who summoned them.

But taking over the world is not so easy. In order to stake their claim, the Legion will need to learn how to navigate the strange magics and abilities this new world has granted them. Abilities which, upon closer inspection, may prove the seed for a legend in the making…

The dawn of a new empire looms on the horizon. Rome will rise anew as they seize cities, battle armies, and expand their territory across this strange and fantastical world. All the while, Marcus will need to figure out how to mitigate the force of nature he's unleashed upon his woefully unprepared world. That, or simply enjoy the front row seat to an epic in the making. Someone will need to tell the story, and who better aside from him?

The die has been cast. The aqueducts are being built. And Rome will once more see glory.

119316.title: Reincarnated into a Villainous Count [System Apocalypse]
119316.description:
The Ice Age Apocalypse has arrived, and humanity’s saviour is a villain.

Alex awakens in the body of Luther Morgan Bellham, a two-bit villainous Count in EverLasting Fire and Ice, the world’s most brutal Open World MMORPG game. To survive, Luther must overcome an Ice Age Apocalypse in a swords and magic medieval world. He faces political unrest, scheming nobles, armies of undead, liches and undead dragons, and more terrifying monitories.

There’s only one problem.

Success is not measured in how quickly the game is finished.

Success, is measured in the days a player makes it through alive.

Completion, is impossible.

Luther must overcome insurmountable odds. Scheming against his brothers, battling criminal organisations, dungeon diving into perilous places for crucial resources – all for his grand solution. If swords and magic aren’t enough to overcome the Ice Age Apocalypse, maybe mechas will be.

Join Morgan Bellham, the villainous count as he blackmails his way into victory and obliterates undead dragons with the mechatronic monstrosities he creates.

All while keeping to his true self: a villain.

Discord Link!

Schedule -

20k words by 06/07/25

4/5 chapters weekly until end of RS Main run to Number 1!

120519.title: The Gods’ Gacha Game [LitRPG, System Manipulator MC]
120519.description:
“Do you want to know what it feels like to manipulate the scenarios and the System to your liking?”

Maximillian has always dreamed of his past life as the God-King where he ruled over all gods and created a divine game where gods competed for supremacy. But now, he awakens not as a king, but as the lowest-ranking divine warrior under the newly born Goddess of Imagination—trapped in the very game he created.

Thrown into a brutal world of monstrous scenarios and scheming deities, Maximillian must exploit his unparalleled knowledge of hidden mechanics to survive and master the ultimate class. A class that allows him to inherit fragments of various divine heroes’ might and manipulate scenarios and the System to his will through plausibility itself.

In a world where imagination shapes reality, can Maximillian outplay gods and mortals alike and uncover the truth behind his fall? Or will the chaos of his own creation devour him before he can reclaim his crown?

Follow Maximillian’s journey as he battles deadly foes, manipulates scenarios, discovers a deadly secret of his existence, and fights to reclaim his rightful place as the King of All Gods!

Contains: LitRPG, Fantasy, Power Fantasy, Progression, Weak to Strong, Strong to Stronger, Meta-Aware Protagonist, System Manipulation, Dungeon Diving, Crafting, Number Go Up, No Harem, and much more.

This story is inspired by many Korean LitRPG novels like Omniscient Reader Viewpoint; however, the story has a totally different setting, story, system, and characters.

What to expect

- Badass Protagonist

- Meta-Aware Protagonist

- Morally Gray MC But Not a Murderhobo

- Exploiting Hidden Mechanic

- Scenario Manipulation

- Manipulating Other Isekai-level Protagonists

120k+ words written. Will be posting daily for at least a month at 4.30 PM UTC

Each chapter is at least 2000+ words.

111984.title: Equilibrium: Bringing God's Light To This Pagan World
111984.description:
Cedric, a legendary crusader and hero of the holy campaign to reclaim Jerusalem, met his end at the hands of a deadly assassin—a blow struck in the very moment of his triumph.

But death was not the end.

By what he believes to be divine will, Cedric awakens in a strange, heretical world—a realm where demons hold power, false gods reign, and humanity nearing the edge of destruction.

The land was corrupted, its kingdoms twisted by dark forces and evil rulers, demanding a righteous purge.

With newfound strength and a divine purpose, Cedric rises once more. Blessed by God, he wields power beyond mortal means, ready to crush those who stand in the way of divine order.

“Lord, You brought me here for a reason. I will not fail You.”

Armed with holy conviction and an unyielding will, Cedric embarks on a brutal quest to cleanse this land of its impurity. The righteous will be delivered, the wicked destroyed, and God's glory restored.

***

What to expect:

Extremely OP Male Lead

Multiple POVs

Multiple Protagonists

NO Harem

Fanatical and Ruthless/Cruel Characters

System elements for MC

Darker Themes

***

Join Discord community: Click Here

Disclaimer: While inspired by Christian themes, this story is a work of fantasy and should not be taken as a theological statement. This work does not conform to all the rules of the Christian Bible.

121008.title: Foxy Blight (Luck+Poison)
121008.description:
Short Summary: Luck + Poison + VR + Time Travel

Summary: Alice White, aka Foxy Blight, has gone back in time 10 years, to the launch of the VR Game Exponential. Using her knowledge, gimmicks, and a Luck+Poison build she seeks to become rich and powerful.

Detailed summary: Time travel VR story with a couple of twists. Similar to how my other stories poke at the holes in certain genres this one takes the cake for the VR Game and time travel genre. A Luck+Poison build that makes sense with a detailed explanation of how stats/game mechanics work. There are actual equations for Luck and how it impacts drop rates and critical hits. Game mechanics where the main character can't exploit easy starting secret quests. Foxy Blight has to actually struggle to stay ahead of top gamers who are more skilled. Game mechanics that make it a real game, not a power trip wish fantasy, with actual balance and game playability taken into consideration. Adaptive response from the controlling programs. Real world family, politics, and practical concerns to building up a guild. Solid world building on why a VR game is taking over everything. An actual reason for the time travel, shocking I know since this is never done. People getting suspicious of Foxy Blight and what she does. Some other stand out highlights that are my favorites in the story are the Kiss of Death, Mega Blade, Human Emperor, very large battles, and Quantum Artificial Intelligence.

Real world drama, congressional hearings, corporate board, assassination attempts, and more. This is about 1/5 to a 1/4 of the story, touching on things other stories in this genre never take into account.

No harem. No OP Progression. Slightly Emotional MC. Strong Drive MC. LITRPG but no tables in story.

Cover: Zonked Eye
Discord: https://discord.gg/QmF3wgnw4s
Release: 5wk(M-F)(Free), 15+7wk(Patreon)
Free World Building Information (Scroll To Bottom): Chapter And Information Links: Foxy Blight | Patreon

107092.title: Nucleus 1: The Dust of Moon [Mature Sci-fi Romance]
107092.description:
When desire meets destiny, even monsters can love.

In 2295, the superpowers that survived World War Three compete for the Moondust Crystal—an artifact that controls the Radi-Mons, radiation-eating monsters spreading an STD that grants immortality at the cost of your humanity.

Lorna, a Nordic psionic agent working for the new North American government, infiltrates Taiwan hunting Crystal data. There she collides with Xin, a heartbroken programmer whose android lover was kidnapped by the regime that employs his college classmate Dilinur—a woman torn between duty and forbidden desire. Meanwhile in Africa, dropout Jabari discovers his gift for piloting mechs might be humanity's last hope.

When the Radi-Mon Primarch Skarn breaks free—obsessed with making Lorna his mate—these four must unite across enemy lines, even as their factions demand loyalty.

But the Crystal doesn't just control monsters. It holds power over hungers they've tried to bury: vengeance, belonging, redemption...and each other. In a universe where sex is currency and love is rebellion, they'll discover the most dangerous virus isn't the one that transforms your body—

—it's the one that opens your heart.

The Dust of Moon begins Nucleus, a relationship-driven, 4-book space opera where Game of Thrones' political intrigue meets Mass Effect's diverse crew dynamics—with the spice turned all the way up.

What to Expect:
• Four POV characters whose personal dramas are as explosive as the space battles
• Unlike grimdark fantasy, the naive-but-noble can triumph here—if they work for it
• A multicultural future: African mechs clash with Chinese psionics while Nordic refugees deal with American corporate intrigue
• Found family dynamics interrupted by interspecies pregnancy, android awakening, and the occasional genocide
• Romance that drives the plot: from desperate one-night stands to soul-deep connections that transcend species
• Cozy slice-of-life moments between battles (there's a cooking scene with a baby dragon in Act 3)
• Adult content that matters: every intimate scene advances character or plot
• Violence, political intrigue, and complex moral choices
• Oh, and tentacles (you'll understand when you get there)

🌶️ Spice Level: Ghost Pepper — Explicit scenes in ~15% of chapters, each one plot-relevant

💬 Author actively engages with every comment

🖥️ This story uses AI tools for editing and proofreading. But all plotlines, characters, and dialogue are written by yours truly.

Updates on Tuesdays & Fridays

📚 Complete Acts 1-2 available (200k words)

🟢 Currently on Act 3: Moondust Pandemonium 

Visit the official site for info on characters, expanded lore, and more:

www.nucleusseries.com (Desktop browsing recommended)

Discord server coming soon. Preview emojis below:

Emoji Batch 1 (Spring 2025)

© 2025 Nucleus Series. All Rights Reserved.

105671.title: Dude! Where's My Princess?
105671.description:
Ever been in love? Arwin had that! Then he found out she was cheating on him. Ouch. Reeling from the blow, he’s out for a drive one day and ends up in another world!

He meets Yaz, a talking skeleton knight on an epic quest. Together, they set off to find a long-lost princess, the knight’s first great love, who was magically imprisoned hundreds of years ago by an evil necromancer, the same man who cursed Yaz into undeath.

It won’t be easy. Goblins, ogres, and dragons await. Things take a turn for the really terrible when they accidentally revive the old necromancer and transform him into a powerful lich. Doh!

The only person who might be powerful enough to help them is the legendarily evil Dark Enchantress. But when she and Arwin meet, sparks fly. Literally. Would you risk your heart falling for someone who could turn you into a toad?

Inspired by Xanth, Magic Kingdom for Sale, and The Hitchhiker’s Guide. 

WHAT TO EXPECT
- classic fantasy quest adventure
- comedy, puns
- friendship and romance
- upbeat tale

121186.title: The Apocalypse Grinder (LitRPG Apocalypse, Timeloop)
121186.description:
The tutorial proved a challenge too great for Ronan Steele. Fortunately for him, death was just the beginning.

Ronan was in a meeting when the apocalypse struck.

Now, rather than spending his day explaining optimised spreadsheets to rich old guys, Ronan now has to defeat hordes of angry goblins to complete the tutorial and make it back home. However, the Earth he left behind is no longer the same, relatively peaceful world.

Merged with three other planets during the apocalyptic integration into the system, the planet he now calls home is filled with mutated, dangerous beasts and even more dangerous invaders from other worlds. In order to protect his peace and get revenge on the system which forced him into this mess, he must use his overpowered heritage to continue amassing strength.

Because unlike other challengers, Ronan has an advantage that not even the system can fix—when he dies, he wakes up at the beginning of the tutorial once more. Not only does he get to return to the beginning, but he keeps his skills and gets an xp boost for his next life.

The further he goes, the more powerful his heritage grows. Eventually he will be able to keep even his levels and items after death.

Most people would crumble when faced with the prospect of an infinite apocalypse, but Ronan is a tenacious fellow. One goal drives him through his endless fights—to bring down the very system that forced this tragedy onto his world.

The content warning tags are to allow me creative freedom. The fight scenes do get a little visceral as that is simply my writing style. The mc swears quite a bit, which is his personality. As for the sensitive content, I mostly don't write things like this but for the occasional scene to develop the mc I felt it was necessary since some readers won't want to read this. I will try to include warnings per chapter when there is such content.

What to expect?

MC starts out fairly average, but quickly grows in strength due to his heritage

MC morals and perspective develop as he experiences the apocalypse through different lives

MC is willing to kill, especially monsters, but is not cruel or inhumane.

Story mostly revolves around the protagonist, but there are occasional POV shifts to develop the story

The system is really crunchy. Expect a LOT of numbers going up.

Average chapter length of 1500-2000 words

POSTING 2 CHAPTERS / DAY

120732.title: Titanomachy [Apocalypse • Progression Fantasy]
120732.description:
When an artifact stolen from the gods binds with River Clarke, Earth goes dark as the System initialises, and humanity is thrust into a universe spanning Battle Royale.

Earth has nine months to win this battle.

River and his small band of friends navigate their new reality, fighting evolved creatures, monsters from nightmares, and completing the quests they need to get stronger. All the while, River has a target on his back as the Universe’s most wanted man for the artifact he has claimed as his own.

But as River begins to understand the artifact’s power, he realises that he might just be Earth’s only hope of survival.

WHAT TO EXPECT

• Time-Loops begin chapter 4
• Apocalypse (Battle Royale) begins chapter 21
• Anti-hero protagonist
• No Harem

SCHEDULE

• 5 Chapters a week for now (daily posting @ 5pm GMT/12pm EST)

PATREON link

• 3 CHAPTERS AHEAD of RR for now. Will periodically increase over time.

62929.title: Trinity of Magic [Progression Fantasy]
62929.description:
Ezekiel recognized early in life that he didn't want to follow in his parent's footsteps and spend the rest of his days as a mere farmer. No, his eyes are set on a grander stage, a place where tales of monster hunters, mighty generals, and benevolent heroes hold court — A world of Magic and mysteries.

One day, the opportunity he had been waiting for arrives. Without a second thought, Ezekiel throws himself headfirst into the adventure. However, not everything turns out to be as magical as he had dreamt it to be...


THIS IS A SLOW BURN FANTASY PROGRESSION LITRPG STORY:

Even though you are not going to see blue boxes from chapter one, I guarantee you that this IS a LitRPG story. This is, however, NOT a pure "game world"! Instead, I have tried to integrate the interface elements of a LitRPG into a world with a very thought-out magic & power system, which will be explored over the course of the first book.

This world doesn't work like a game, where you can put '5 points in strength' and the body somehow changes magically into a stronger version of itself. It might take a couple of chapters for the world and magic to start to make sense, but I feel like a power system built on solid principles is a lot more rewarding in the long run (...and more IMMERSIVE!).


RELEASE SCHEDULE:

Regular release Schedule: 3 Chapters a week; Mo, We, Fr.
I will post more chapters, in the beginning, to get my feet off the ground :)
Trinity of Magic is ONLY published on Royal Road and Scribblehub. Please notify me if you find it elsewhere.

Join our discord server now!

122166.title: The Pictomancer (Crafting, Isekai, LitRPG)
122166.description:
What would you sacrifice for your craft?

For Clive, it was everything. His career, the love of his life, eight years of relentless pursuit. Yet despite all he’d given up, his creations never quite reached the success he hoped for.

In death, his dedication earned him a second chance. Reborn as a Pictomancer, Clive awakens with the power of creation. Every stroke of his pencil births reality, and every brushstroke commands the elements themselves.

Now the real work begins. To reclaim everything he ever lost, Clive must achieve Ascension, proving his art worthy of surpassing the very gods who granted his rebirth.

This time, the only limit is his imagination

What to expect:

 🎨⚔️ Art that kills

⚡💪 OP to broken MC

🔨⚔️ Omni-crafting + Combat action

🚫💕 No Harem

 ✅📖Book 1 complete

⚡📅 5x uploads 

Patreon 20 chapters ahead

95818.title: Tales of the Endless Empire [LitRPG Apocalypse]
95818.description:
Description:

Thalion’s life as a marine biologist was modest in wealth but rich in joy and fulfillment. The arrival of the system sent everyone on Earth into a tutorial while merging it with four other planets. Not everything was bad, though. The system granted people magic and even ways to defy time itself. For now, everyone struggles to survive the tutorial, which has become more of a slaughter trial than a learning experience.

If you like stories with Shapeshifters and Bloodmages. Check this out!!! 

A post-apocalyptic LitRPG series inspired by The Primal Hunter, Defiance of the Fall, and Elden Ring.

Release Schedule:

Five chapters a week. (Wordcount between 2,000 and 3,000)

Also, this novel is posted on Royal Road and Patreon with Patreon being up to 60 chapters ahead of the Royal Road release.

What to expect:

-Multi-POV Storytelling but mostly main character

-Adaptive Magic System – The magic evolves based on the wielder, making every spellcaster’s abilities truly unique.

-No harem

-Entities Beyond Humanity

-Expansive Worldbuilding

121319.title: Andy in the Apocalypse [LitRPG System Apocalypse]
121319.description:
On currents of magic, the System arrived. Monsters followed. Forty days until the first invasion. No pressure.

Andy wanted a quiet life—just his trailer, the Sonoran desert, and a job that didn’t ask much of him. Instead, he got a front-row seat to Tucson’s collapse. Magic rewrote the rules. Monsters stalked the streets. People mutated—or died.

He didn’t plan to be a hero. But when the screaming started, Andy grabbed a broken broomstick and did what he does best: survive.

Now he’s got more than his own skin to worry about—kids looking to him for protection, neighbors turning to him for leadership, and a trailer park slowly transforming into a fortress. The System’s leveling him up—but not fast enough.

Because the countdown’s ticking, the invasions are coming, and if Andy fails, everyone he’s begun to care about will be slaughtered.

A progression fantasy about found family, desperate courage, and carving hope out of chaos.

Note to Victor of Tucson fans: Aside from being set in the Tucson area, this story is not related to that series, but if you like VoT, I think you’ll enjoy it. :)

New chapters every day until I catch up to backlog, then there will be 3 a week.

Advance chapters can be found on my Patreon.

118570.title: Voidlight Rising (A Xianxia Cultivation Adventure)
118570.description:
The road to redemption is paved in Voidlight

Once, Tsuyuki Yoru was one of the brightest minds of the ancient world, but after being infected with the corruptive qi of the void, he was locked away. While the world slowly forgot him, he waited for his chance to return.

Finally back in his right mind after thousands of years, he seizes the chance for freedom with the unwitting help of a young cultivator named Tenri Lin. Having sacrificed much of his power in his escape, Yoru returns to Tenri’s hometown where all manner of monsters and wicked cultivators lay poised to strike.

To keep this new safe haven, and remain undetected by the other Ascendents, he must turn from the path of pure moonlight and take on the very same dark powers that drove him mad in an era long past. Can he tame the void enough to save his friends from harm? Or will it drive him to even deeper madness…

Expectations:

- A Xianxia Adventure

- Slow Burn Romance

- OP MC

- Found Family

Content Warnings: Sensitive Content regarding Mental Illness

118810.title: The Demon King's Fate: A Kingdom Building LitRPG
118810.description:
Dying didn’t surprise Carter. Reincarnating with his cancer still intact did.

Diagnosed with terminal cancer and ready to die alone, Carter expected silence, not a sword-wielding hero seeking vengeance in a throne room. Reborn as Lucivar, the Demon King, he barely has time to breathe before a glitch in reality flings him back in time… to the day the real Demon King was born.

And his disease? It came with him.

A demonic parasite named Joshua, malicious, sentient, and addicted to chaos, feeds off Carter’s pain and power. Now trapped in a hostile fantasy world, hunted by gods, haunted by his disease, and plagued by passive-aggressive system messages, Carter and his unlikely gang of demons and beasts must navigate a world filled with powers far beyond what they’re equipped to handle.

He was supposed to die once. Now he has to survive again. And again.

Carter's going to need more than chemo to get through this.

What to expect:

📕 Release Schedule: M-F 5:30 AM PST

💪 Progression: Weak —> Strong MC

🏰 Isekai/LitRPG/Kingdom building/Adventure - Non-crunchy LitRPG mechanics. Think of it like Tensura if the great sage was evil and wanted Rimuru to kill everyone!

⚔️ System Quests, Parasitic Quests, Demonic Evolutions, a unique class, and more!

💔 No harem and minimal romance

Minor spoiler!

(Characters on the banner are Kyr, Lunarius, Kril, Cedric, Zorrack, Viressa, Azazel, and Calenvir, respectively! Mobile users can only see Cedric, Zorrack, and Viressa.)

112473.title: The Dungeon Master: It's a Magical World
112473.description:
“Hey. Wanna buy a dungeon?”

Kai looked up at the human salesman. He looked down at himself. At the salesman. At himself. At the salesman. In a tone that clearly asked, ‘Are you stupid?, he stated, “I’m a gremlin.”

“Don’t you worry, sir. This here is a contract for purchase with payments deferred, with annual sums owing as a percentage of revenue. A starter plan for the discerning gentleman dungeon master.”

Torn from a boring and unfulfilling human life on Earth, Kai was mysteriously sent to a new world and transformed into a gremlin for…reasons. He hasn’t figured that part out yet, but he sure as heck is going to punch whoever’s responsible in the frickin’ face one day. He’s also going to do just about whatever it takes to become human again.

When a super shady salesman appears out of nowhere, offering to sell him a magical dungeon core with no down payment and no money upfront, a deal seemingly too good to be true, he’s starving at the time and more interested in the edible signing bonus. But when he finally gets around to planting the core, he truly is the proud new owner of a dungeon. Well, the start of one. He’s gonna have to level the puck out of it. If he gets it to 100 floors, the gods will grant any wish.

Follow Kai as he builds the coolest, deadliest, most fun dungeon ever, with traps and treasures, monsters and mayhem. Even more importantly, filling it with a ragtag community of misfits and outsiders who come together to support each other and thrive.

WHAT TO EXPECT
- Gamelit (levelling unlocks more dungeon and abilities, but no personal stats)
- Non-OP protagonist who starts weak but occasionally kicks ass
- Some dark humour
- Bad guys getting what’s coming to them
- The power of friendship!

89034.title: Nightmare Realm Summoner
89034.description:
When the system warned the world that it was coming a week in advance, Alex couldn’t have been more excited.

In college for a degree he didn’t care about to get a job he didn’t want, the promise of a world where magic and challenge awaited — even at the potential cost of death — was the best news he possibly could have imagined.  

Alex was ready for a new life. He wasn’t ready for his only friend to shove him through a portal into hell the moment the apocalypse started. Instead of getting to punt rabbits and farm wolves, Alex finds himself stranded in a warped world where even the bugs are stronger than he is. Even with a summoner class that gains the powers of its monsters, most people would have died.  

Alex didn’t get the memo.

He might have liked challenge a little bit too much. Where others saw certain death, he found something else.

Opportunity.

CLICK HERE TO READ NOW!

Schedule: Monday, Wednesday, Friday, and Sunday @ 11 AM CST

Expect some slight elements of Pokemon mixed with a LitRPG Apocalypse setting that takes some inspiration from the Solo Leveling's summoning/dungeon solo-ing & elements of JJK's power system!

121984.title: Stumbling Up: A Loser's Guide to Progression
121984.description:
Meet Richard: ‘immortal’ banana slug, emotional terrorist, dungeon life coach… Then there’s Cole. He just wants to survive. Richard has goals. Neither of them is optimistic.

 In a world split between mundanes and adventurers, Cole rolled the worst specialization imaginable: [Self-Criticism]. One drunken mistake later, he’s conscripted into the front lines of a world-spanning war. First stop? A deadly trial dungeon with a sarcastic slug, a mysterious goth, and two best friends who are absolutely not qualified for this.

Richard is a ‘foot-long’ telepathic jerk with a gift for emotional damage.
Leo is a pink-sweater-wearing himbo with a double-bladed axe and a hit-first mentality.
Tandy is a genius crafter with a deep and irrational hatred of sheep.
And Meredeath? She’s not in Kansas anymore but she is kicking monster butt in platform boots.

Together, they form [Your Mom’s Party], the dungeon’s least-likely survivors.

Stumbling Up is a character-driven, stat-lite LitRPG with slice-of-life pacing, sharp banter, emotional gut-punches, and more than a few dick jokes. It’s about failure, friendship, and finding value in the messiest parts of yourself. Welcome to the party.

Try not to die.

———————

Update Schedule:

10 Chapters at Launch + Daily Chapters for the First Week
3 Chapters a Week thereafter (Sun, W, F) @14:11 EST
More on Patreon. Bonus Chapters when we hit (Follow, Comment, Rating, and Rising Star) Hidden Objectives.

———————

What to Expect

✅ Stat-lite LitRPG mechanics (Skills, specializations, party dynamics—not spreadsheets)
✅ Character-driven narrative with emotional arcs and messy growth
✅ Found family and friendship front and center
✅ Dungeon crawling with unconventional strategies and slice-of-life interludes
✅ Banana slug wisdom (or at least loud, sarcastic opinions)
✅ Progression through failure (because some of us level up the hard way)

What You Won’t Find

❌ Harem or romance-driven plotlines (but feelings may still happen. Poorly.)
❌ Spice (unless you count dungeon bile or Meredeath’s combat boots)
❌ Power fantasy wish fulfillment (unless your fantasy is learning to like yourself)
❌ Edgelord monologuing (unless Richard is making fun of it)
❌ Generic dungeon tropes (everything here is squishier, smellier, and probably alive)

122449.title: The Changeling Returns
122449.description:
Being a Fairy princess isn't all it's cracked up to be...

My name is Fay. 

At least, that's what I call myself. It's not so much who I am. It's what I am.

I can't remember my real name or my old life. When I was too little to know any better, the two most powerful fairies of the Unseelie court stole me from my family and claimed me as their own. Since then, they've been feeding me up on magic and turning me into someone I don't want to be.

They've let me live in the mortal world, but we never stay in any place long enough to put down roots. Every few months, it's a new town, a new school, and a new group of kids that I have less and less in common with. 

But this time, something is different.

The magic is strong, here in Parfrey's Glen. And the people have secrets I'm just beginning to uncover.

I think I might be home.

118714.title: This Magical Girl is Mine
118714.description:
Fabulous riches, unfathomable power, and the undivided attention of the girl she's obsessed with—that's the offer the Jovians made to Rachel. All she has to do is sign the dotted line.

Ten years ago, the planet Jupiter vanished from the night sky. That same day, the Jovians announced their presence on Earth by gifting magical powers to teenage girls. Then one of those girls—one of the first witches—blew up Texas. Now the Jovians are more selective, and they only choose adult women to join their war as magical girls and witches.

Rachel has always had an interest in magical girls, but it became an obsession when she learned that her own roommate, Sophia, was secretly Strix Striga, one of the most powerful and respected magical girls in all of North America. Sophia’s double life as a heroine has left her without any time for Rachel—and the witches she fights get all the attention from Sophia that Rachel desperately craves. It’s infuriating. It’s untenable.

But now Rachel is a witch, and one that the Jovians have taken a special interest in. With their guidance and her own burning drive, she’ll grow her power until she’s ready to challenge the invincible Striga. And then, at long last, her precious Sophia will be hers.

This Magical Girl is Mine updates every Sunday and Wednesday, with a break week every 3-4 weeks. Each chapter will tell you when the next break week is happening in the author's note at the bottom.

Note: this story will never go to KU exclusivity. It will remain free for everyone forever.

121043.title: Stormblade [Skill Merge Portal Break]
121043.description:
The storm embodies destruction, and now, so does Kade Noelstra. 

On the worst day of his life, Kade's system awakened, giving him the power of an unchecked storm. 

It came too late to save his stepfather, but it's enough to let Kade follow in his footsteps. But the Unique skill he awakened is as strong as it is dangerous—for him and everyone around him. Most people would abandon a skill that unpredictable. Kade has other plans.

Skills can be merged. Storms can be tamed. All Kade has to do is delve portals like his stepfather did, gather the cores from the monsters within, and come out stronger. The speed of his growth draws unwanted eyes, both human and otherwise, but as the portals grow ever more numerous, he finds he can't afford to slow down.

He'll forge his lightning into a blade to wield, no matter who or what tries to stop him.

What to Expect: 

- A portal-break world inspired by Changeling and Solo Leveling.
- An MC with a plan and the willingness to grind for it.
- Skills, skill merges, and synergistic skill alterations.
- 2k to 3k-word chapters, 7 days/week through Rising Stars, then 5 days/week after.

122502.title: Path of the Deathless: A Death-Grinding LitRPG Progression Fantasy [Book 1&2 fully written] [B3 Commenced]
122502.description:
Whatever kills Shiv only makes him stronger.
The world stands against Shiv. He's an outcast in his town, considered an unholy omen. The System seems to spurn him, and the authorities refuse to let anyone grant him a Path, leaving him unable to grow beyond his natural limits. But Shiv was never someone who gave up when the world dealt him bad cards. After years of fruitlessly hunting monsters on his own to earn a Path, Shiv receives an unexpected opportunity: a chance to earn the Town Lord’s favor, and to finally rise beyond the limits of humanity.
Yet, when his town is attacked, and Shiv is murdered in combat, he finds himself bestowed with a Unique Path possessed by no one else.
The Path of the Deathless.
Though he resurrects upon being killed, his killer casts him down from his frontier town and into the Abyss. In an unfamiliar place of darkness and wonder, Shiv finds himself freed from his previous limits, capable of charting his own destiny, but only if he can overcome countless dangers and lethal adversaries.
But that's ultimately a good thing for Shiv, because where most find the end of their stories in death, he will discover only power. After all, how scary is a dangerous world when death is so nutritional?
Update Pace: Three 2-3k chapters a day for the foreseeable future.
Patreon is 300k+ words ahead 
Discord Link: https://discord.gg/6GdEDNreBU
Cover Artist: Inkary
What to expect:
+ Dying as a leveling system
+ Stubborn Skill-Grinder system inspiration
+ Unrelenting MC who doesn't fear pain or death and eats trauma for breakfast
+ Good-leaning anti-hero MC 
+ Cool companions 
+ Post-murder cooking
+ Skill evolutions
+ No smut
+ Friendly spider-folk
+ Powerful antagonists and high-octane battles

121463.title: Reiteration: Witch of Futures
121463.description:
The Great Witch sought to remake the world. The last and newest of her Four Harbingers revolted against her, ravaging Tokyo in their battle.

It was the closest the Reverse side of the world came to total exposure, and the creatures of myth to being revealed at large. But that Harbinger brought the witch's ambition to an end, the barrier unbroken and the long-kept secret of the Binding Association unspilled.

Those of the Surface rebuilt and life moved on. Seven years have passed since then. That Harbinger came to be known as a shining hero of light—first of the Three Equalizers, guardians of human order against evil sprung from the pages of legends.

But all Erina knew was she came home from school one day, and the next, she woke up surrounded by machines at the bottom of a familiar laboratory with two bodies at her feet and about half an idea who she even was.

And before the end of the day, she's kowtowing to the wizard yakuza?!

Expect:

• Piecewise plot that unfolds gradually

• Cute struggling protagonist who's always punching up

• Increasing scale and tactics in combat

• Emphasis on character personalities; magic system serves to complement that

• An OP cheat skill hero exists, and isn't the protagonist.

Cover by @HepariArt (Twitter). No AI was used. Updates on Tue, Thu, Sat.

Includes writer's playlist and character art!

100501.title: The Madness of Yilheim
100501.description:
What if the world you knew was just the surface of something far greater?

In The Madness of Yilheim, Valerius Delindor thought he was just another student, living an ordinary life. But when he and his siblings are torn from Earth and thrown into the unknown, they discover that the very blood in their veins holds secrets beyond imagination.

Yilheim is a world of towering civilizations, ancient ruins brimming with forgotten power, and war-torn lands ruled by those who wield strength beyond comprehension. Here, power is not given—it is taken, earned, and fought for with blood and will.

Among the factions that dominate this world, the Unbound reject all authority, seeking freedom at any cost. The Judges enforce absolute law, wielding might that bends even the strongest to their will. And lurking in the shadows, there are forces even they fear—beings who have walked this world long before history was written.

Thrown into this chaos, Valerius must forge his own path, uncovering the truth behind his existence while surviving battles against warriors, monsters, and forces beyond reason. But as he and his siblings grow stronger, they begin to realize—

The true enemy may not be the world itself, but the destiny that binds them to it.

For those who crave epic storytelling, unstoppable warriors, and a world where legends rise and fall—this is The Madness of Yilheim.

Support the story and read chapters early on 

Read chapters early on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Tarbleor

118250.title: The Pinnacle Warrior [LitRPG Dungeon Diving]
118250.description:
Her mother, a Spellblade, her father a Talismartist. So why did she have to be a Warrior?

When she was a child, Astrid heard stories about how her mother served on the walls of Humanity’s Bulwark to protect their country from their inhuman enemies on every side. With terrifying stories about their many foes, she quickly decided to become a delver in the Dungeon. There, she could gain enough levels and experience to serve as one of humanity’s elites, to protect her borders and countrymen. To do that, she’d need a party, and she had a plan.

That plan didn’t work out, and now, she’s all alone, trying to become a delver without her planned allies or family. With just her Skills and armor, she’s going to show the world that, even if she doesn't have a lick of magic, Astrid Warrior will be a force to be reckoned with.

-A nonmagical MC who’s confronting the Dungeon and her enemies with the strength of her arms.

-Reliance on a couple strong Skills.

-Lots of action.

-Monsters and enemies to slay!

-Slowly building a core party to delve with.

-Updating daily for the first month.

101992.title: Hello World (Silly Sci-Fi, Zombies Included)
101992.description:
Welcome to The Awesometacular Space Adventures (TASA), a comedic space opera that will span multiple seasons.

Season 1, Hello World, introduces the adventures of Henry Hayes (aka @kittyboy), a human turned AI-enhanced biotic at the cost of service to the outer solar system's military. Follow along as @kittyboy finds himself accidentally pulled into a crisis that could turn the tide of the war. As he rises through the starmada ranks, he must balance his desire to be free to live his own life with an unexpected love interest. But make no mistake, @kittyboy is a rascal at heart, and chances are he'll mess it all up spectacularly.

Prepare for a lighthearted journey through space, and don't forget, "Reanimation begins with a scream!"

AUTHOR'S NOTE: What to Expect

This story features progression elements. It is not LitRPG. The main character does progress over time, gaining better armor, weapons, and ships, but this happens in the context of the story without specifically calling out specs on the weapons or a leveling system. There are "classes" as well, but this is built into the world. Our main character, for example, starts out as a Wavepilot.

Note: shout out to my first reviewer; AI art removed, and some tweaking to the overview to better set expectations. 👍🏻 

STATUS OF THE SERIES:

The Awesometacular Space Adventures

Season 1: Hello World is now complete

✓ Published
Part 1 - The Vanquisher
- Episode 1 - Hello World
- Episode 2 - The Overtaken
- Episode 3 - The Vanquisher
- Episode 4 - The Return of the Fracker
- Episode 5 - Escape to Eros
Part 2 - Road to Oblivion
- Episode 6 - Hot Potato
- Episode 7 - The Island of Misfit Toys
- Episode 8 - The Colony
- Episode 9 - The Murder Ship
- Episode 10 - The Beginning of the End of the World

Next Up ➞ I will release two more books as new entries.

Season 2: The End of the World: @kittyboy and his crew deal with the repercussions of the outbreak.

Season 3: The End of the World Sucks: Sure, the world may have ended, but there's still something to fight for in the quest for peace In the solar system, as long as @kittyboy can hold himself together.

Join Me on Patreon or visit my website for updates.

I have started a Patreon focused on three areas.

1) TASA Early Access to Season 2 (September 2025)

2) Background Information about the World of TASA, including the history of TASA, deleted scenes, early attempts from related work, artwork, Glossary, etc.

3) A blog for other writers where I will talk habits, software, etc.

Thank you for reading!

"May you remember!"

#YOLF (You Only Live Forever)

122867.title: Paragon of Skills
122867.description:
Jacob Cloud is sixteen, a miner’s son, and he knows his fate: die young, broke, and anonymous in the bowels of Shit’s Creek, a nowhere town that feeds silver ore to richer cities and spits out its sons in pine boxes. He dreams of more. In this world, Knights are one step above Adventurers—protectors, guides, and, most importantly, heroes. But to even try for a Knight’s life, you need gold, rare Skills, and connections Jacob will never have.

Then one day, the mine floor gives out. Jacob falls—not to his death, but into the chance of a lifetime: a Rainbow-ranked Skill Crystal, something so rare people kill over them, and so powerful it could turn a nobody into a legend. Except Jacob doesn’t get a weapon or healing Skill. He gets The Grimoire Extraordinaire—a support Skill that doesn’t even attack, defend, or heal. It shows him the flaws in any Skill or item, nothing more. No instant power. No glory.

But Jacob isn’t an idiot. He grinds. He experiments. He uses the Grimoire to fix the basics: how to grip a pick, how to channel mana, how to train. In five days trapped underground, he boosts his mining skills to levels nobles would envy. When he claws his way out, he’s ready to quit the mines for good.

117130.title: AQUILA [Dystopian Corpo-Feudalism + Animal Companions]
117130.description:
Twenty one. That’s the age when everything changes. Everyone manifests a symbiont, a creature invisible to all but its host that shapes their destiny in a rigid world.

Conrada Dorrien harbors a dangerous secret: she alone can see everyone’s symbionts. 

But revealing her gift could trigger a buyout of her contract, separating her from family and friends, and placing her at the mercy of ruthless corporations. Best case she ends up a lab-rat in some R&D project, worst case a weapon to a private military contractor.

As manifestation approaches, Conrada hopes for a life within the sanctuary of academia following in her father’s footsteps and providing refuge from the confines of her serfdom. But she fears her extraordinary connection to the symbionts means she’s destined for anything but easy obscurity.

All it takes is a single word. 

Classified.  

Conrada finally learns what happens when bidding wars between recruiters erupt at manifestation when she becomes the latest acquisition by Aquila Operations, a boutique corporate consulting firm. No corporate mergers, land acquisitions, or balancing budgets here. Conrada joins a team known for their unorthodox methods and a reputation for always getting the job done. 

For Aquila is in the business of the unique and the dangerous, and charges prices accordingly.

~2k word chapters, updating twice a week.

What to Expect: 1st person POV, slow burn, low fantasy, soft sci-fi, corporate-feudalism. It's not 100% cyberpunk, but it has some vibes of the genre. 

The ethics/morals are intentionally grey on some things more than others, and while the MC has an opinion, you don't need to agree with her (and other characters won't agree with her either). Diverse side characters.

There is a hetero romance, but I don't do anything quickly so it'll be a slow build from distrustful, to friendship, to romance. 

Written as 'episodes' that do a little bit of overarching plot and little bit of 'mission of the week'. A core cast of characters are present most episodes, and others will only be there for that episode.

There will often be more questions than answers. 

What Not to Expect: Harems, LitRPG or system elements, protagonists who are going to solve every problem with power or killing, a discrete 'bad' guy/antagonist.

Profanity is a common occurrence, other content warnings are there for when the plot needs it.
